overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring a foggy, war-torn Victorian London street at night. The character walks through a medical camp with Red Cross tents, enters a temporary shelter, then continues through cobblestone streets lit by gas lamps, passing under a stone archway and crossing a bridge. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: field hospital courtyard with medical tents and supply crates

events.description: character approaches and enters a canvas medical tent

agents.ego_description: walking through a muddy medical supply area scattered with wooden crates toward a tent entrance

entered.detail: large canvas tent with red cross symbol on the side
stacked wooden supply boxes and crates
tall black iron fence surrounding the courtyard
large stone building with arched windows in the background
wooden plank pathway through the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a muddy field hospital courtyard surrounded by stone buildings. Medical tents with red crosses, wooden crates, and supply boxes are scattered around. The character approaches a tent entrance at the edge of the wooden platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical tent interior with patient cots and supplies

events.description: character exits the medical tent back to the courtyard

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit tent interior, passing empty medical cots and a wooden desk, then exiting

entered.detail: interior canvas walls and ceiling of the medical tent
empty patient bed with white sheets on the right side
wooden desk with medical supplies and papers
lit oil lamp providing warm light on a small table

segments.scene_description: Inside the canvas medical tent, the character walks past empty patient cots and a wooden desk with medical supplies. The space is dimly lit by oil lamps before the character exits back to the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open medical camp with scattered tents leading to street exit

events.description: passing medical personnel in white coats near the tents

agents.ego_description: walking away from the medical tents through the camp, passing doctors in white coats near the iron gate

notable_agents.action: medical worker in white coat walking through the camp area

entered.detail: large iron gate with stone pillars marking the exit from the camp
small wooden hut with sloped roof
beginning of metal tram tracks embedded in cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tent, the character walks through the open medical camp where doctors in white coats move between tents. The character passes wooden barricades and approaches an iron gate leading to the foggy street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy cobblestone street with tram tracks and brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy cobblestone street following tram tracks, passing brick buildings and abandoned carts

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with tall windows
metal tram rails running down the center of the street
abandoned wooden cart with wheels on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone street lined with red brick buildings and old gas street lamps. Tram tracks run down the center of the road, and wooden carts sit abandoned along the sides in the dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with tobacco shop and stone archway tunnel

events.description: character passes under the stone archway into a narrower covered passage

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing under a stone archway, passing a figure near the tobacco shop

notable_agents.action: figure in red standing near the Flying Horse Tobaccos shop entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a tunnel through the building
brick building with painted sign reading FLYING HORSE TOBACCOS
stack of wooden barrels outside the shop

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone archway passing a building with a 'Flying Horse Tobaccos' sign and a figure standing outside. After walking under the archway, the street narrows into a darker passage lined with brick walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge over water with railings

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge with low railings, heading toward the fog-shrouded distance

entered.detail: cobblestone surface of the bridge with wooden plank sections
low stone wall railing on the left side of the bridge
tall stone tower visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide stone bridge with low railings, crossing over water. The bridge is lined with street lamps disappearing into the dense fog ahead, with a stone tower visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic field hospital courtyard into the oppressive, fog-shrouded streets of Victorian London. It begins by tracking the character through a muddy medical camp filled with Red Cross tents and supply crates, moving briefly into the dim, oil-lit interior of a canvas tent before emerging back into the courtyard where doctors move between wooden barricades. As the character passes through an iron gate, the environment shifts from the camp to a desolate cobblestone street lined with red brick buildings, gas lamps, and abandoned carts. The scene then narrows as the camera follows the character past a tobacco shop and under a stone archway into a dark brick passage. Finally, the path opens up onto a wide stone bridge with low railings, where the street lamps and a distant stone tower gradually disappear into a dense, enveloping fog.
